name: Dictation photo-review fails with 'Review failed' / server error
description: Verifying a completed dictation by photographing the handwritten text fails: the first attempt shows 'Review failed — Looks like you're offline or our servers can't be reached. Check your internet connection and try again.' on the 'Well done!' verification screen; the 2nd and 3rd retries show a different generic message saying something is wrong on our side, try later. Device was online. Blocks dictation completion/verification.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: dictation photo review failures can be surfaced through the generic fetch rejection formatter, where timeout/abort paths were indistinguishable from real offline network failures, producing misleading offline copy while the device is online. Variants: (1) app-owned timeout/AbortError shows timeout/server-cause copy, not offline copy; (2) genuine offline/network rejection still shows offline guidance; (3) server 5xx/error responses show server-side failure copy; (4) Try again re-runs the review request and can recover. Regression tests: apps/mobile/src/lib/api-errors.test.ts covers timeout-vs-network classification, and apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/dictation/complete.test.tsx covers review failure alert plus retry behavior.
